title: phyllanthus dasystylus
intro: Phyllanthus dasystylus, also known as Chandra, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phyllanthus dasystylus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate liver and kidney problems, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction, powder, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
